title: primula mollis subsp. seclusa
intro: Primula mollis subsp. seclusa, also known as the hidden primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the primrose family (Primulaceae) that is native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Primula mollis subsp. seclusa include its ability to aid in the relief of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Primula mollis subsp. seclusa may be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
